features: Created especially for coloured hair, Dove Colour Care Conditioner keeps your hair colour vibrant for up to ten weeks*
Enriched with vibrant colour Lock Technology to keep your hair colour vibrant and fresh for longer
This conditioner for dyed hair nourishes your hair so that it feels silky, beautiful and strong after washing
Leaves coloured hair feeling silky and manageable every day
With regular use, Dove Colour Care Conditioner progressively moisturises your hair
description: Product Description You've finally found that perfect shade, and want to do all you can to protect your fresh hair colour? Designed specifically for dyed hair, Dove Colour Care Conditioner helps to keep colour vibrant for up to ten weeks.* its unique formula is enriched with vibrant colour Lock Technology to keep your hair colour radiant and fresh for up to 40 washes. Gentle enough for everyday use, this conditioner for colour-treated hair Provides two-way care - instantly smoothing while progressively nourishing your hair, making it feel and look beautiful, strong and healthier Wash after wash. Enjoy excellent hair care with the best conditioner for coloured hair in the Dove range and experience Its deeply nourishing properties. Stun the world with noticeably softer, silkier hair and long-lasting colour. For the best results, use as a system with Dove Colour Care Shampoo to provide the ultimate protection to your favourite hair colour. How to use: first, apply Dove Colour Care Shampoo to wet hair, lather and rinse. It washes cleanly away revealing smooth, vibrant looking hair. Follow up with colour care Conditioner. Smooth the colour-protecting conditioner into your hair, focusing on mid-lengths to ends and rinse. *For best results, use together with Dove Colour Care Shampoo. Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Behentrimonium Chloride, Parfum, Glycerin, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Hydrolyzed SOY Protein, Sodium Gluconate, Amodimethicone, Paraffinum Liquidum, Dipropylene Glycol, Lactic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Citric Acid, Sodium Chloride, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Citrate, Phenoxyethanol, Cetrimonium Chloride, PEG-7 Propylheptyl Ether, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Linalool Directions After washing hair, apply conditioner to hair, leave on for a few minutes and then rinse. Safety Warning For external use only Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
